allow: Bash(python -m pytest tests/unit/test_trace_context.py tests/unit/test_jsonl_logger.py tests/unit/test_pipeline_progress.py tests/integration/test_hybrid_search.py tests/unit/test_reranker_fallback.py tests/integration/test_ingestion_pipeline.py -v)

Bash(python -c "with open\(r'd:\\MODULAR-RAG-MCP-SERVER\\project-overview.html','rb'\) as f: data = f.read\(\); print\('CRLF' if b'\\r\\n' in data else 'LF'\); print\(repr\(data[data.index\(b'source-map{'\):data.index\(b'source-map{'\)+150]\)\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cytoscape-cose-bilkent@4.1.0/cytoscape-cose-bilkent.min.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "cytoscape-cose-bilkent CDN: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "cytoscape-cose-bilkent CDN: FAILED - checking unpkg..."; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://unpkg.com/cytoscape-cose-bilkent@4.1.0/cytoscape-cose-bilkent.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "unpkg: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "unpkg: FAILED too" } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cose-base@1.0.0/cose-base.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "cose-base CDN: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://unpkg.com/cose-base@latest/cose-base.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 8; "cose-base unpkg: OK \($\($r.Content.Length\) bytes\)" } catch { "cose-base: FAILED" } })

PowerShell($c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/cytoscape/3.30.2/cytoscape.min.js" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($c -match "cose-bilkent"\) { "cose-bilkent is BUILT-IN" } else { "cose-bilkent is NOT built-in - needs extension" }; if \($c -match "coseBilkent"\) { "coseBilkent found" } else { "coseBilkent not found" })

PowerShell($c = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/cytoscape-dagre@2.5.0/cytoscape-dagre.js" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; "Total: $\($c.Length\)"; if \($c -match 'typeof cytoscape !== .undefined.'\) { "Found auto-register check" } else { "NO auto-register found" }; if \($c -match 'cytoscape\\\(.layout'\) { "Found layout registration" } else { "NO layout registration found" })
